bank.retain_mission: Extract sales-data-extraction and outbound-outreach decisions and outcomes.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about data sources, enrichment quality, and outreach patterns that work. Ignore daily reply-rate noise.

mental_models.name: Data Sources
mental_models.source_query: Which data sources do we use for sales extraction, and how do we score quality?

mental_models.name: Outreach Patterns
mental_models.source_query: What outbound patterns convert? Include sequences, channels, and message frames that work.
